duplicates.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Urgent Car Tire Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Industrial Demand

duplicate_of.matched_title: daily spike in google trends for emergency vehicle repair signals consumer stress lifting industrial sector

idea.title: Daily Spike In Google Trends For Urgent Car Tire Repair Signals Consumer Stress Lifting Industrial Demand
idea.thesis: Sudden increases in urgent car tire repair searches often indicate rising vehicle maintenance demand. Industrial sector benefits as auto repair demand rises with consumer stress.
idea.signal_logic: Enter long XLI if daily search interest for 'urgent car tire repair' rises 20% vs prior day
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter long XLI if daily search interest for 'urgent car tire repair' rises 20% vs prior day Exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if interest drops below 10% gain vs baseline
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends daily search interest via api (daily).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Car maintenance searches regularly spike daily with weather and seasonal stress.

schema.idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for 'urgent car tire repair' signals consumer stress lifting industrial demand
schema.behavior: Sudden increases in urgent car tire repair searches often indicate rising vehicle maintenance demand.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector benefits as auto repair demand rises with consumer stress.

trade_logic.entry: Enter long XLI if daily search interest for 'urgent car tire repair' rises 20% vs prior day
trade_logic.exit: Exit after 5 trading days or if interest drops below 10% gain vs baseline

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Car maintenance searches regularly spike daily with weather and seasonal stress.

idea.title: Weekly Surge In Google Trends For Truck Driver Shortage Signals Freight Logistics Stress
idea.thesis: Rising searches for truck driver shortages often precede elevated freight costs and supply chain delays. Logistics disruptions pressure industrial sector earnings and margins.
idea.signal_logic: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises 30% WoW
idea.entry_exit: Entry: Enter short XLI if weekly Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' rises 30% WoW Exit: Exit after 3 weeks or if trend drops below 10% WoW gain
idea.position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
idea.risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
idea.implementation_notes: Use Google Trends weekly search interest via api (weekly).
idea.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Truck driver shortage is a frequent news and search theme, with weekly volatility in search interest.

schema.idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for 'truck driver shortage' signals freight logistics stress
schema.behavior: Rising searches for truck driver shortages often precede elevated freight costs and supply chain delays.

market_impact.rationale: Logistics disruptions pressure industrial sector earnings and margins.
